summary: Clear, well‑balanced audience recording of a hot ’89 show highlighted by an incendiary The Other One and trippy Help>Slip sequence.
review: Both reviewers praise the tape’s surprisingly clear audience sound despite a low recording level that forces the listener to turn up the volume. Musically the concert shines with a blistering The Other One and a nicely psychedelic Help > Slipknot! > Franklin's Tower, plus solid first‑set moments.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently strong show comments (standout jams) and good‑ish recording quality (clear AUD with only low‑level issue) across two detailed 4‑star reviews.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear sound with minimal crowd chatter; however the tape was recorded at a very low level, requiring volume boost for comfortable listening.

standout_songs: Help on the Way > Slipknot! > Franklin's Tower
show_quality.setlist_flow: First set offers several highlights; second set builds into a scorching The Other One and a trippy Help>Slip sequence, giving the show strong momentum.

band_member_comments.Keys: Brent’s run of ascending chromatic chords in counterpoint is singled out as a scream‑worthy moment.
